perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with black hair wearing a black dress and large pearl hoop earrings stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, gesturing toward her accessories. (2) She moves toward a refrigerated display case and points to packages of quail eggs. (3) She picks up a yellow bag of 'Bonito-flavored Quail Eggs', posing with it and showing the price on the shelf. (4) The scene transitions to an indoor room where the woman and another female companion (wearing a beret) sit together, holding the product and eating the eggs on skewers while gesturing to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music plays. A female voice speaks with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone about her earrings. (2) The music continues at a steady volume as the female voice describes the product in the store. Ambient shopping sounds are muffled. (3) Two female voices are heard in conversation during the indoor tasting segment, accompanied by variety-show style sound effects like pops and chimes when text appears on screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles throughout the video translating the spoken dialogue. (2) Decorative/Effect Text: '爛透了' appears in a blue burst bubble for comedic effect. '熱賣新品' (Hot New Item) appears in red and yellow. (3) Content Text: '福記 鰹魚風味 鵪鶉蛋' (Fuchi Bonito Flavored Quail Eggs) and 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo are visible.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Shopping intro -> Product selection in store -> Indoor taste test and review

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: One main creator shown shopping, then joined by a second woman for the tasting part.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: An Asian female wearing a black dress with chest cut-outs and large pearl hoop earrings. The second woman wears a white top and a black beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco warehouse with industrial shelves and glass-door refrigerators; then a domestic indoor living room with plush toys and furniture in the background.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Intro -> Product Search -> Demonstration -> Evaluation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a specific food product (Fuchi Quail Eggs) available at Costco, emphasizing its convenience, price point, and flavor profile for potential buyers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to finding, purchasing, and reviewing the specific branded product.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of variety-show style dynamic text and high-energy narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a standard social media format for influencer product reviews, focusing on the Costco shopping experience which is a popular niche.
